message:
feat(policy): add ForensicReport generator with query/export pipeline

Add ForensicReport aggregating decisions, audit chain, revocations,
approvals, namespace violations, compliance summary, and quarantine
status. ForensicQuery supports time range, actor/action filters, and
denials-only mode. Export as JSON or JSONL. 9 new tests including e2e
incident reconstruction scenario. Compilation verified via cargo check;
test execution pending build system availability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
